title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates optimizing an AI Dark Factory codebase generator by combining Claude Opus for deep reasoning tasks with Kimi K2.6 for faster implementation and validation. The approach allocates stronger models only where reasoning quality matters most while maintaining token efficiency at scale.
